id: hills
title: Hills
description: Cover is natually provided
notes: Developer notes. Testing description This map should provide cover, mostly for assymmetric battles agains units that have a lot of aerial space control
width: 89
height: 35
spawn_zones: [[8, 2, 37, 29]]
enemy_zones: [[49, 2, 82, 29]]
